title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
